summary: Generates pan and tilt channel data for moving lighting fixtures (yokes/movers). Replaces hand-rolled rotation-to-DMX math — outputs DMX-ready values respecting per-fixture range, invert, and home offsets.

key_params.name: pan
key_params.note: Pan angle in degrees (or normalized, depending on mode)

key_params.name: panrange
key_params.note: Mechanical pan range of the fixture (e.g. 540°)

common_gotchas: Pair with the DMX Fixture POP / DMX Out POP for the full lighting pipeline — Pan Tilt CHOP only generates the pan/tilt values, not full DMX frames.
Different fixtures have different mechanical ranges — set `panrange`/`tiltrange` per-fixture, otherwise the head won't reach the intended angle.
